"'''Blind Force'''" is a 38-page [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] featured in ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Volume 1]]''. It was written by [[W. Haden Blackman|Haden Blackman]] and drawn by [[Ben Caldwell]], with lettering by [[Michael David Thomas]]. It takes place five months after the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|First Battle of Geonosis]].

==Plot summary==
[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] are sent to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Nivek]], which was shrouded in perpetual darkness. [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] believes a [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] ambush is being prepared there, but when the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] arrive, they are unable to see anything. Anakin and Obi-Wan then come under attack from the native [[Shadowman|Shadowmen]]. Because of the darkness, they can't see and are beaten back. However, by covering their eyes, they end their reliance on sight. This leaves [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] for their sight. Now with no restrictions, they defeat the Shadowmen and destroy the CIS [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droid]] factory.<ref name="CW1" />
